title.en: The Poison Dragon Realm Lord really wanted to k...

content.en:
The Poison Dragon Realm Lord really wanted to kill the Purple Yun Realm Lord.

At the beginning, he chased and killed the Purple Yun Realm Lord, but he didn't expect that this Purple Yun Realm Lord was extremely demonic, comprehended the strongest mastery of the Eight Realms, and had a combat power no less than that of the weaker Ninth Realm.

However, he still severely damaged the Purple Yun Realm Lord.

As a result, the Purple Yun Realm took the initiative to escape with some kind of secret technique, and after that, he continued to deduce, but he couldn't find the Master of the Purple Yun Realm.

However, in these years, he often deduced the traces of the Purple Yun Realm Lord, but he couldn't find the Purple Yun Realm Lord.

In desperation, he had no choice but to give up.

Unexpectedly, the current Purple Yun Realm Lord appeared again, and he had the cultivation of the Ninth Realm.

Of course, he is also much stronger now than he was at the beginning, not necessarily weaker than the Purple Yun Realm Lord.

Bang!!!!

The two sides fought each other.

But as soon as they fought, the Poison Dragon Realm Lord was crushed.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord's Eight Realms Supreme Absolute Skill is too powerful, and when it is cast by the Ninth Realm, it is enough to injure the Poison Dragon Realm Lord.

Soon.

The Poison Dragon Realm Lord was not lightly injured.

He also tried to transmit the message to the other ninth realms of the Ten Pyloric Gates, but the Purple Yun Realm Lord was fully prepared and used a special dimensional star weapon to seal this dimensional void, causing the transmission to not be transmitted.

The key is that the Poison Dragon Realm Lord has not yet 13 incarnations in the outside world, otherwise he can also be communicated.

"Purple Yun Realm Lord, let me go, otherwise the Ten Pyloric Sects will kill you!"

"As long as you let us go, I can make a vow not to target you again. "

The Poison Dragon Realm Lord seemed to be begging for mercy, but he was actually threatening.

The Ten Pyloric Gates are indeed very powerful, and there is more than one Ninth Realm, especially the Ten Pyloric Sect's Cover Shadow Realm Lord is a top Ninth Realm, and the current Purple Yun Realm Lord is definitely not an opponent.

However, the Purple Yun Realm Lord would not let go of the Poison Dragon Realm Lord.

"Poisonous Dragon Realm Lord, you slaughtered our Tianyun Sect for the treasure of our Tianyun Sect, and you still want me to let you go?"

"Unless you hand over that treasure, I might be able to spare you!"

The Purple Yun Realm Lord said coldly.

"That treasure is not on me!" The Poison Dragon Realm Lord said: "You should know that the preciousness of that treasure, although I said that I destroyed your Tianyun Sect with my hand, but the Ten Pyloric Sect knows about that treasure, how can I keep it." That treasure is in the hands of the Lord of the Covered Nether Realm, you can capture me and exchange that treasure with the Lord of the Nether Realm, how about it?"

"Hahaha, your Poison Dragon Realm Lord is not worth the value of that treasure, you are stupid, catch you, and then inform the Lord of the Covered Dark Realm, the Lord of the Covered Dark Realm will definitely make a move on me, I am not his opponent. "

"Besides, I just want to kill you!"

The Purple Yun Realm Lord kept attacking, bombarding the Poison Dragon Realm Lord.

The Poison Dragon Realm Lord wanted to escape, but the Purple Yun Realm Lord used a special domain body secret technique to seal off this place, and he couldn't easily break this place.

Gradually, the Poison Dragon Realm Lord's injuries became more and more serious.

Finally a moment.

A purple light blasted directly into the depths of the Poison Dragon Realm Lord's soul will, directly shattering his soul will.

But even so, the Poison Dragon Realm Lord's soul will turned into countless will incarnations and tried to escape, but they were all wiped out one by one by the Purple Yun Realm Lord's transcendent soul will mastery, leaving no trace at all.

After confirming that the Poison Dragon Realm Lord had completely fallen, the Purple Yun Realm Lord left.

And she also slammed into the headquarters of the Poison Dragon Clan in the thirteenth dimension with a palm in the air, destroying it with one palm, and across many dimensions, all the clansmen left by the Poison Dragon Clan in other places were wiped out, and none of them remained.

......

Wow!

After a few breaths, a figure appeared, completely black, as if it had descended from the darkest place.

Whoa!!

Three more figures descended.

These four are all the ninth realms of the Ten Dark Gates, and the black figure is the Lord of the Covered Dark Realm.

"The poisonous dragon has been killed!"

The Lord of the Covered Realm frowned.

"Sect Master, can you tell who did it?" asked a Ninth Realm.

"Judging from the aura left, it should be the Purple Yun Realm Lord of the Tianyun Sect, and the other party has broken through to the Ninth Realm. "Cover the Netherworld Lord.

Several Ninth Realms frowned, and a Ninth Realm who was not tied by power was terrifying, because they couldn't find each other, they couldn't kill her.

Unless they ask one of the nine forces to make a move, they can definitely find out the Purple Yun Realm Lord.

However, those nine forces were very transcendent, how could they possibly deal with an unfamiliar Ninth Realm!

"Track down the Purple Yun Realm Lord of the Ninth Realm, and contact some other forces, if anyone provides clues to the Purple Yun Realm Lord, our Ten Pyloric Sects will be rewarded. "

The Lord of the Covered Realm commanded.

......

"Purple Yun Realm Lord, congratulations on killing the Poison Dragon Realm Lord!"

Ye Tian congratulated.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord said lightly: "It's just that I killed the Poison Dragon Realm Lord, the Ten Pyloric Gates are still there, and I don't have any hope of rebuilding the Tianyun Sect." "

"The Purple Yun Realm Lord will surpass the Cover Realm Lord sooner or later!" Ye Tian said.

"It's too difficult!" the Purple Yun Realm Lord shook his head, "The Ten Pyloric Sect has obtained that treasure from our Tianyun Sect, and the strength of the Cover Shadow Realm Lord is definitely much more terrifying than in the past, I have no hope of surpassing the Lord of the Cover Shadow Realm!"

"Treasures?"

Ye Tian didn't know what kind of treasure it was, but it was able to make the Purple Yun Realm Lord feel that it was a treasure, and it was definitely not an ordinary thing.

He didn't ask, though.

However, the Purple Yun Realm Lord took the initiative to reveal it.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, aren't you curious about what kind of treasure it is?"

The Purple Yun Realm Lord said with a smile.

Ye Tian shook his head, he was not interested.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord continued, "It was a treasure obtained from the seventeenth dimension, called the Pearl of the Ruins. The Orb of Returning to the Ruins can help the Eighth Realm 187 and even the Ninth Realm to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dimension. "

"Supreme Dimensional Rules?"

Ye Tian was puzzled, what is this.

Seeing Ye Tian's doubts, the Lord of the Purple Yun Realm introduced: "The three hundred and sixty-five dimensional rules are the limit of the dimensional rules, if you want to continue to improve, you must comprehend the supreme dimensional rules, and one of the conditions for impacting the ninth realm is to comprehend the supreme dimensional rules. The supreme dimensional rules, the perfect dimensional domain, the cultivation of the peak of the eighth realm, and the soul will of the sixteenth dimensional limit are all necessary conditions for impacting the ninth realm. In addition, it is also necessary to choose a multi-dimensional star as the natal star body and absorb the power of the multi-dimensional star to break the shackles, which is also what all the ninth realms have to do. Without the power of multi-dimensional stars, it is almost impossible to break the shackles. "

"Choose a multi-dimensional star as your natal planet to break the shackles with the help of a multi-dimensional star?"

Ye Tian didn't know this secret yet, "But if the multi-dimensional star body is shattered, will it have an impact on the Ninth Realm?"

"There is an impact, if it is really broken, then the ninth realm will fall to the realm. But the normally selected multi-dimensional stars were all powerful, and the Ninth Realm could not be broken at all. If you've been to the Mist-Eyed Star, you should know the enormity of the Mist-Eyed Star, it's the most ordinary multi-dimensional star, and even so, no Ninth Realm can crush it. There are still many multi-dimensional astral bodies, none of which can be approached by the Ninth Realm, so if you choose them, you don't have to worry about this problem!" the Purple Yun Realm Lord smiled.
